title: Crispy Herbal Herbs Stir-fry
description: This crispy herbal herbs stir-fry is a crowd-pleasing Portuguese dish featuring mustard powder and other keto-friendly ingredients for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Kale, chopped
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen can be used.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chopped garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds or until fragrant.
Stir in mustard powder and turmeric powder, cooking for another 1 minute to activate flavors.
Add chopped kale and sprinkle with sea salt and black pepper. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until the kale is wilted but still slightly crisp.
Drizzle with keto-friendly soy sauce and stir again for about a minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Serve hot, drizzled with extra olive oil if desired.
